ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location address of the restaurant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the restaurant */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total seating capacity of the restaurant */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the restaurant */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant the table belongs to */,
  "table_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the table */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available at the table */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the table */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the restaurant where the table is located */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the table */,
  "view" TEXT /* Special view associated with the table */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the table is wheelchair accessible */,
  "last_cleaned" TEXT /* Last time the table was cleaned */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date for the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the table being reserved */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the reservation (e.g., Available, Reserved) */,
  "reservation_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the reservation */,
  "party_size" INTEGER /* Size of the party making the reservation */,
  "confirmation_number" TEXT /* Unique confirmation number for the reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the reservation */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who handled the reservation */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the customer */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reservation was canceled (if applicable) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation (if applicable) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Pending, Refunded) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Cash, Online) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reservation (e.g., Web, Phone, In-Person) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Who created the reservation (e.g., Customer, Staff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "anniversary" TEXT /* Anniversary date of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last visit */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount the customer has spent at the restaurant */,
  "referred_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who referred the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation related to the feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or additional feedback provided by the customer */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who served the customer */,
  "food_quality" INTEGER /* Rating for food quality (1-5 scale) */,
  "service_quality" INTEGER /* Rating for service quality (1-5 scale) */,
  "cleanliness" INTEGER /* Rating for cleanliness (1-5 scale) */,
  "atmosphere" INTEGER /* Rating for atmosphere (1-5 scale) */,
  "would_recommend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer would recommend the restaurant */,
  "date_of_visit" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant the staff member works at */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Host, Manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the staff member */,
  "last_performance_review" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "next_performance_review" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation linked to this history entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Created, Cancelled) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_history_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_history_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Confirmation, Reminder) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who received the notification */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who sent the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Failed, Pending) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., Email, SMS, Push Notification) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the preference */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., Seating, Occasion) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., Window, Birthday) */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was set */,
  "preference_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the preference (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "table_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the table being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the availability is recorded */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the table on that date */,
  "availability_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the availability */,
  "availability_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the availability */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the availability record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_table_availability_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)
